external_id.description: Matches the source article's publish-draft.json external_id — links this post back to one article.

source_article_path.description: Path to the article this post amplifies, e.g. articles/mcp-deep-dive/part-02

hook.description: First 1-2 lines, visible before LinkedIn's 'see more' gate (~210 chars).

body.description: The rest of the post: one concrete idea from the article, grounded in research-bundle.json/build-artifact.json evidence.
